MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Defendant Nutrasky, LLC's unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel Stephen E. O'Day is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel Stephen E. O'Day may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Good cause appearing, counsel Laura Jimenez Garcia may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.
